title: $italic
text: $italic Apply the italic character attribute to a string in a Unifield. $italic ( String ) Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description String String String to italicize Return Values Returns the result of applying the italic character attribute to String Use Use in Form components, but only applicable to Unifields. Description The function $italic returns the result of applying the italic character attribute to String . The result is visible only in a displayed Unifield. MY_UNIFIELD = $italic("aaabbb") Copy Afterwards, MY_UNIFIELD contains aaabbb. Related Links stripattributes Remove character attributes, frames, and rulers from Source and put the result in Target. $stripattributes Return the result of removing character attributes, frames, and rulers from a string.
